message:
feat: palette correctness, env normalization, theme override wiring, and invariant tests

Fix upstream color collisions (role_user blend, score_low blend), add
formal env-flag precedence documentation, wire persisted theme.json
loading at startup, and add 26 new invariant tests covering profile
downgrade monotonicity, override merge semantics, and critical token
fg/bg contracts across all presets × profiles.

Closes: 2dccg.10.1, 2dccg.10.3, 2dccg.10.4, 2dccg.10.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
